summary: Text-to-image generation. Model dispatch: platform channel (gemini-3-pro-image / gpt-image-2: submit→poll→download) else llm-proxy. Platform failure does NOT fall back to llm-proxy.

scenarios.name: JSON body exceeds 1MB → 413 intent, observable as ECONNRESET
scenarios.sourceRef: readRequestBuffer L459-L475 (rejects >1MB at L467-L469, calls request.destroy() at L468); catch L923 sendMivoJson 413
scenarios.discrepancy: readRequestBuffer calls request.destroy() (L468) immediately after rejecting, which tears down the socket BEFORE the 413 response (sendMivoJson L923) can be delivered. The client therefore observes ECONNRESET, not a clean 413. BFF MUST send a clean 413 without destroying the request prematurely — intended-change candidate.

scenarios.name: platform model without MIVO_PLATFORM_KEY
scenarios.condition: MIVO_PLATFORM_KEY unset or not starting with 'mivo_'

body.error: MIVO_PLATFORM_KEY 未配置，请配置或切换 GPT 模型

scenarios.discrepancy: Plan §6.1 does not specify a status for this case. Current code returns 500 with a message that names the env var. BFF may want 503 + sanitized message — flag as intended-change candidate.

scenarios.name: llm-proxy model without MIVO_IMAGE_API_KEY
scenarios.condition: model NOT in MIVO_PLATFORM_CHANNELS AND MIVO_IMAGE_API_KEY unset
scenarios.discrepancy: Config error surfaced as 500; message leaks env var name. Same intended-change candidate as above.

scenarios.name: normal 200 (platform channel)
scenarios.sourceRef: runMivoPlatformImageJob L817-L853; success branch L843-L845 (buf.toString('base64')); normalizeMivoImages L545-L564
scenarios.note: NOT live-captured: requires real platform key + reachable upstream. Shape is identical to llm-proxy 200.

scenarios.name: normal 200 (llm-proxy fallback)
scenarios.condition: MIVO_IMAGE_API_KEY valid; model not in MIVO_PLATFORM_CHANNELS
scenarios.note: NOT live-captured: requires real llm-proxy key. n clamped 1-4 (L908); ratio payload via resolveRatioPayload L533-L543.

scenarios.name: platform poll timeout → 504
scenarios.condition: platform submit accepted but poll exceeds 175s deadline

body.error: 上游生成超时，可降低质量重试
上游生成超时，可稍后重试、换比例或减少参考图

scenarios.sourceRef: mivoPlatformPollDeadlineMs=175000 L583; poll loop L707-L742; timeout branch L827-L832
scenarios.note: NOT live-captured: would need a stalled real platform job. Message is resolution-dependent.

scenarios.name: llm-proxy upstream timeout → 504
scenarios.sourceRef: mivoUpstreamTimeoutMs=240000 L34; fetchUpstreamWithTimeout L80-L101; UpstreamRequestTimeoutError catch L923

scenarios.name: platform download empty/failed → 502
scenarios.sourceRef: empty images L838-L841; download throw L843-L852 (502 sanitized)

scenarios.name: llm-proxy upstream 4xx/5xx passthrough
scenarios.note: Status code passed through verbatim (upstream 401 → client 401). Body always {error: <string>}.

scenarios.name: no-fallback invariant (platform failure does not fall through to llm-proxy)
scenarios.expected: runMivoPlatformImageJob returns handled=true in every terminal branch; caller returns without reaching llm-proxy
scenarios.sourceRef: L884-L896 (if handled return); runMivoPlatformImageJob L823-L852 returns true on success/timeout/failed/aborted/error

invariants: quality clamped to low|medium|high, default medium (L527-L530)
platform path: token single-flight + 401 refresh-once (see platform-helpers.json)
client abort → controller.abort() on response close (L889-L892)
